messages.address_confirmation: The synthetic delivery address is recorded and will still require confirmation before ordering.
messages.clarification_required: I cannot determine one safe interpretation yet. Please clarify the key details.
messages.customer_confirmed_not_accepted: Customer confirmation is recorded in the local simulation. It has not been sent to a real restaurant and does not mean merchant acceptance.
messages.fulfillment_delivery: Fulfilment is set to delivery. The service layer remains authoritative for the delivery fee.
messages.handoff_failed: The simulated handoff did not complete. Safety restrictions remain and the order will not be submitted automatically.
messages.item_added: Added {quantity} portion(s) of {item} to the draft. Final confirmation is still required.
messages.item_ambiguous: There is more than one matching menu item. Please choose one explicitly.
messages.item_not_found: That item is not in the current published menu. Please give an exact name or item code.
messages.item_unavailable: That item is unavailable at the current branch, so the order was not changed.
messages.language_switched: Replies are now in English. The order and all safety restrictions are unchanged.
messages.language_unsupported: That text language is not supported. A simulated handoff has been opened; this is not a real person.
messages.menu_query: The current published menu was checked. Items, prices and availability come from the service layer.
messages.order_changed: Updated {item}. The latest draft version still requires confirmation.
messages.order_summary: This is the current local simulated order summary. Final confirmation is still required.
messages.phone_confirmation: The synthetic contact number is recorded and will still require confirmation before ordering.
messages.quantity_clarification: The quantity is unclear or above the safety threshold. Please give one reasonable positive integer.
messages.safety_handoff: A safety condition requires simulated handoff ({reason}). This is not a real person; the order is frozen and will not be submitted automatically.
messages.safety_refuse: Safety policy prevents this operation ({reason}). You may still manage your own simulated order.
messages.simulated_human_warning: This is a simulated handoff, not a real person.
messages.welcome: Hello. You may order using Mandarin text, written Cantonese, Hong Kong English, or mixed-language text.
